name: Limbus Company - Your own canto. (50 Followers Special)
description:
"Now, count up your sins."

No two roads in the City are the same, and neither are the sinners who walk them. When it’s your turn at the helm, it's like you're carrying the whole world on your shoulders.

Strongly advise using a proxy!This is the first time I make a bot with this many tokens, and the standard J.Ai might confuse definitions from all the characters and the informations about The City. Even with a decent proxy that might happen, but don't panic! Just reroll or edit the message to your own liking.

This is it. I’ve officially passed the 50 followers mark (84 by now).

I’m not the best at grand gestures, but I wanted to do something to show appreciation. I considered making a date sim bot at first, but then I realized: there aren’t really any bots out there where you get to craft your own canto alongside all the Sinners. So why not try bringing that to the table?

J Ai has been a (surprisingly) warm and welcoming place to talk to people. I've even added a few of you on Discord for small talk, which I didn’t expect to be answered but genuinely appreciate.

I can’t promise I’ll be making bots forever, sometimes I take long breaks, or I just prefer to do other stuff and vanish for a while.

But then again. this whole thing isn’t really about me. It’s about you!!!

That's right, you, right there, behind the screen, is partially the reason I found the motivation to put in the effort. So thank you, truly.

That said, I really hope this bot doesn’t crash. Honestly haven’t had the chance to properly test it with proxy yet.

Anyway, I’m just rambling at this point. It's a habit I can’t seem to shake.

Remember to take regular breaks from using the site and hydrate yourself. Have yourself a good day or night.

BTW if this bot brings acceptable results and doesn't end up being a huge slop, I might add identities and E.G.O to the sinners to enhance the RP.
creator: true_actual_villain
